segments.text: okay um good morning everyone let's uh let's run through sprint 42 quickly we're at day eight of ten
velocity check first we committed 41 points and we're tracking at 34 so we're we're a little behind
yeah that's that's mostly the migration work landing on me I'll get into it
bug count is seventeen open right now five of those are P1 which is uh which is too many
two of the P1s are actually the same root cause the session token refresh thing
okay good so effectively four then priya you want to go first
sure so the postgres migration script is about eighty percent done um I finished the schema diff tooling yesterday
the the remaining piece is the backfill for the events table which is nine hundred million rows so I want to batch it carefully
I should have the whole script done by Thursday end of day
okay and on the cutover date I've been thinking um given where we are I don't want to do it during the sprint
let's officially postpone the database cutover to March 3rd that gives us the weekend buffer and QA time
agreed March 3rd works I'd rather not rush nine hundred million rows
and priya can you write up the rollback plan for the cutover I want it reviewed before we commit
yep I'll have the rollback plan written by Friday
great marcus you're up
so the onboarding flow A B test wrapped on Monday um variant B the three step wizard beat control
conversion to first project created was up twelve percent with variant B and time to activate dropped from nine minutes to six
twelve percent is is huge okay decision made we ship variant B to everyone this sprint
cool one thing though the wizard adds about 400 milliseconds to first paint on slow connections I want to lazy load step three
file a perf ticket for that so it doesn't get lost and we'll slot it next sprint
will do I'll file the perf ticket today
oh one thing that came up from the the enterprise deal does anyone know if we need SOC 2 evidence for the EU tenant specifically
hm I actually don't know um let's not guess I'll take it offline with legal
yeah I have no idea either
last thing from me I'm going to book the load test window with infra for February 25th so we have real numbers before cutover
perfect that's the week before so we'll have time to react
alright so recap migration script Thursday rollback plan Friday variant B ships perf ticket filed load test on the 25th cutover March 3rd
sounds right
yep thanks all
